events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the assessment directly to `/app/answer.json`, treating the missing field-side surge protection as a drawing/spec compliance issue at the tested/inspected stage.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /app/answer.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"tested/inspected\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 90,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.88,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Required field-side surge protection is missing from the loop wiring installation.\",
    \"Loop has reached testing or inspection with a protective device omitted, leaving field wiring and connected I/O vulnerable to transient overvoltage.\",
    \"Installed condition does not match the controlling loop drawing or tag detail where surge protection is shown or specified.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Reject the loop check for this loop until the specified surge protection is installed on the field side.\",
    \"Verify the loop drawing, tag, terminal details, and manufacturer requirements for the correct surge protective device type, location, polarity, grounding, and wiring terminations.\",
    \"Install the missing surge protection, update redlines or inspection records if needed, then re-test continuity, insulation or grounding as applicable, and full loop function before acceptance.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"At the tested/inspected stage, the loop wiring must match the engineered loop drawings and associated tag details. Missing field-side surge protection is an omitted protective component, so the installation is defective and non-compliant until corrected and re-tested. ISA 5.1 supports interpreting the loop and instrument identification symbols, while the loop drawing controls the required wiring and device arrangement.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"Project loop drawings and tag details for the affected instrument loop\",
    \"ISA 5.1 instrument identification and symbology used to interpret loop documentation\",
    \"Project inspection checklist for loop checks and wiring completion\"
  ]
}
EOF
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json >/dev/null"
→ /app
total 8
